blended.narrative: Edelweiss Valley is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 26 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 53°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
